summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. 30/30 backend pytest tests pass (auth, receipts, admin guards, approve with plan_months body + validation, reject clears plan fields, manual user creation with all variations). Frontend E2E verified: admin login, 'Agregar usuario' creates a manual user (no email path), row shows 'Manual' label on top of table, Aprobar opens receipt-modal with slider defaulting to 6, plan-step chips 1/3/6/12 correctly update plan-current-value, modal-approve-btn POSTs plan_months and row flips to Suscrito with row-plan-{id} showing '3 meses · vence <date>'. No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Empty body returns 422 (Pydantic) instead of 400 documented in spec. Functionally fine; main agent may want to unify error envelope.

Accepts trailing-whitespace emails after .strip().lower() but does not run Pydantic EmailStr validation on the form field, so malformed emails (e.g. 'foo') would be persisted. Consider validating with EmailStr or a regex.
Cookies are SameSite=None; Secure=True hardcoded — fine on HTTPS preview, would silently fail on http://localhost.

issues: plan-current-value renders the number and the 'meses' label as adjacent inline blocks; text_content collapses to '6meses'. Visually fine (the 3xl number sits on its own line) but worth aware of for screen readers — consider aria-label='6 meses'.

action_items: (Optional) Validate email format on /api/admin/users/manual (currently only .strip().lower(); any non-empty string is stored).
(Optional) Add aria-label to plan-current-value so '6 meses' is announced together.
critical_code_review_comments: approve endpoint: payload validation duplicates Pydantic + manual check (`plan_months not in (1,3,6,12)`). Consider `Literal[1,3,6,12]` on the Pydantic model for one-shot 422 validation and remove the manual check.
Manual user receipt validation logic in create_manual_user duplicates the receipts/upload validator. Extract into a helper to keep DRY (same 5MB / JPG-only / <100 bytes checks appear twice).
list_users() now correctly uses aggregation $addFields for has_receipt (iteration 1 fix verified) and excludes the heavy receipt_image blob — good.

Partial unique index on email (partialFilterExpression {email:{$type:'string'}}) is correctly created and on_startup migrates the old full-unique index. Verified two manual users without email can co-exist.
server.py is at ~415 lines — still acceptable but split routers (auth/, admin/, receipts/) before adding more endpoints.
ADMIN_PASSWORD=12345 hardcoded in .env is acceptable for demo but should be rotated for production.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (add manual user, slider default=6, all chip steps update value, approve with chosen plan_months, row reflects Suscrito + plan info)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* users via /api/auth/register and /api/admin/users/manual (including 2 manual users with no email, 1 manual with JPG → pending, 1 E2E manual user TEST_E2E_Manual_* approved with 3-month plan).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 acceptance criteria validated. Pytest file covers: auth (login/logout/me/duplicate), receipts (jpg/png/auth), admin guards (401/403), admin list iter2 fields (manual, plan_months, plan_started_at, plan_expires_at, has_receipt), approve (missing body, invalid value, all valid values 1/3/6/12, persistence), reject (clears plan + receipt), manual users (with/without email, with/without file, duplicate email, non-jpg, >5MB, admin-only). Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_gymnite.py.
